subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath turned toward the Dayspring of the Cause on a day when darkness prevailed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی اقبل الی مشرق الامر فی یوم اسودت فیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
